title: Arlo | Lounge Swivel Task Chair
brand_hint: OTG / Offices to Go (look for MVL or OTG model code)

specs.manufacturer: OTG / Offices to Go (a division of Global Furniture Group)
specs.materials: Plush cushions, contoured back, 5-prong fiberglass-reinforced black nylon base with nylon glides (or polished-aluminum optional)
finishes_available: Optional polished-aluminum base with chrome-finished cylinder
key_features: Pneumatic seat height adjustment (17"–22.5") with soft-descent lift
specs.notes: Companion model: MVL13086 (Lounge Swivel Tilter) — same line, different mechanism
